description: Silver steel case with a fixed bezel for durability, style and comforttitan logo at the 12 hour mark date aperture in between the 4 and 5 hour markStainless steel strap interlooped with leather  at the dial with a butterfly claspBrown dial with silver coloured handsScrew to reset timeSolid case back for enhanced durabilityWater resistance up to 30 meters allowing you to use it even when showeringWarranty: 2 years
